title: SQL: variable arguments in CAST function
poc: select cast(f/f as integer) from x;
key_bug_features: CAST function with variable arguments in SQL
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_table (id INT PRIMARY KEY, value FLOAT, name VARCHAR(50));
SELECT CAST(value AS INTEGER) FROM test_table WHERE value IS NOT NULL;
SELECT CAST(value / id AS FLOAT) FROM test_table;
SELECT CAST((SELECT AVG(value) FROM test_table) AS INTEGER);
